productDisplayName: Indian Terrain Men Riley Maroon T-shirt
description: "Mail By Aniket Keshi & Syed, on 25 April 2012" Composition Burgundy vintage pique polo neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed collar, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs in green, buttoned chest placket, a vented hem and branding in embroidery and appliqué on left chest Fitting Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Hand wash or machine wash cold using mild detergent Do not wring or bleach Flat dry in shade Do not iron on print Stylish to the hilt, this burgundy sporty t-shirt from indian terrain is a great addition to your wardrobe. Be the cynosure of all eyes in this stylish Riley tee with its contrast coloured cuffs from the brand's Must Have's collection, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. The ribbed sleeve cuffs sit snug on well toned arms, and the vented hem offers a comfortable Fit around the waist. Pair it with denims or corduroys and suede shoes to look like the king of casual wear. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height: 6& rsquo Shoulders: 18& rdquo
